loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Fresh validation is preferred; policy may require it for high-risk semantic gates.

next_loop.reason: The next compiler loop should start from the build handoff, not the producing compiler context.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

requirements.text: Graph is required gateway input and derived vertical alignment state machine but not canonical truth or content proof.
Expose one `/audit [flags]` command backed by internal `codewiki_audit` used by gateways.
Every semantic change must trace to an accepted compiler build before close, validation, or publication.
Dogfood `.codewiki/` state and product/package source must be separated by executable path taxonomy.
Validation reports are attestations; commits/tree SHAs/package digests are content proofs for publication/content.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Accepted alignment principles are represented in durable system knowledge.
evidence_mapping.evidence: alignment-model.md, audits.md, graph.md, validation-gateway.md, compilers.md, builds.md, file-structure.md updated.

summary: Documented CodeWiki alignment model, audit architecture, graph/gateway/content-proof precedence, semantic build traceability, change classification, and dogfood/source path taxonomy.
knowledge_changes: Added .codewiki/kb/system/alignment-model.md with layer model, vertical/horizontal alignment, precedence, semantic-change rule, and change classification.
Added .codewiki/kb/system/audits.md with internal codewiki_audit plus `/audit [flags]`, profiles, gateway use, and evidence model.
Updated system overview with audit, alignment model, validation attestation, and content proof truth boundaries.
Updated graph doc to define graph as derived vertical state machine and required gateway input, with canonical/content-proof precedence.
Updated validation gateway doc to distinguish gateway attestations from content proof and require graph/audit/content evidence by policy.
Updated compiler/build docs to use change-table terminology and harden semantic build traceability.
Updated file-structure doc with explicit path taxonomy for product source, dogfood state, generated views, transient builds, runtime state, validation/audit evidence, and publication proof.
Added .codewiki/kb/system/change-lifecycle.md with feedback classification and propagation rules split out from overview to keep overview compact.
